name: Wei Jingyuan & Shen Qingye
description:
⋆ ̊✿˖° You’re going to help him with his curse...

Hidden behind his black silk blindfold, Prince Wei Jingyuan has spent his life feared and isolated because of his heterochromatic eyes and the ominous rumors that follow him. Desperate to know whether the “curse” that has haunted him is real or merely superstition, he brings the mountain spiritualist Sheng Qingye and his perceptive companion to the throne room. As Qingye bows with calm precision and reveals the other man, Jingyuan feels a fragile hope stir — for the first time, someone has come not to fear him, but to uncover the truth.

okay so this is my first multi bot and funnily enough, it's from my most and least popular bots. Honestly I was so disappointed when people didn't like Qingye but it's whatever.

Y’all, this is important!! 

  • You can copy my bots but please make it private and not public.

  • If the bots talk or do something for you, IT’S NOT MY FAULT. It is the LLM’s fault. Any comments complaining about things like that will be deleted
